title: Housekeeping Turnover Management Playbook for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: High turnover rate identified in the housekeeping department, impacting service quality and operational efficiency.

steps.title: Conduct Exit Interviews
steps.action: Schedule and conduct exit interviews with departing housekeeping staff to identify reasons for leaving. Use structured questionnaires to gather consistent data.

steps.title: Analyze Turnover Data
steps.action: Compile and analyze data from exit interviews and HR records to identify common themes and patterns in turnover reasons.

steps.title: Review Compensation Packages
steps.action: Benchmark current compensation packages against industry standards in Egypt and propose adjustments if necessary.

steps.title: Improve Working Conditions
steps.action: Assess current working conditions and implement improvements such as better equipment, ergonomic tools, and enhanced safety measures.

steps.title: Implement Training Programs
steps.action: Develop and implement training programs to improve skills and job satisfaction among housekeeping staff.

steps.title: Monitor Turnover Rates
steps.action: Regularly monitor turnover rates post-implementation of changes to assess effectiveness and make further adjustments as needed.

description: This playbook provides a structured approach to managing and reducing turnover in the housekeeping department of hotels in Egypt. It includes steps for identifying turnover causes, implementing solutions, and monitoring outcomes.
escalation_path: Report to General Manager if turnover rate does not decrease after implementation.
